message.super_lead.zipline_dismount: Press Shift to leave the zipline
container.super_lead.cargo_manifest.basi: Place samples to define the filter
tooltip.super_lead.preset_binder.create_: Right-click to create and bind a player preset
tooltip.super_lead.preset_binder.bind_hi: Shift+right-click a rope: add/remove it from this preset
super_lead.config.title: Super Lead Config
super_lead.preset.prompt.title: Visual Preset Request
super_lead.preset.prompt.hint: Server admin asks to override your local visual tuning.
super_lead.server_config.title: Server Config
super_lead.server_config.hint: §7Slider/toggle changes apply live and persist to super_lead-common.toml.
super_lead.preset.op_screen.empty: No presets stored. Type a name and click New to create one.
super_lead.preset.op_screen.invalid_name: §cInvalid name. Use letters, digits, _ or - (1-32 chars).
super_lead.preset.op_screen.cmd_hint: §8Presets are save-local. Export/import copies JSON files through the global exchange folder.
super_lead.zone.manage.empty: No physics zones in this dimension. Click Shears Select, then Shift+right-click two corners with shears.
super_lead.zone.manage.hint: §7Click a zone on the left to preview its bounds in-world. Delete affects only this dimension.
super_lead.zone.create.title: Create Physics Zone
super_lead.zone.create.name: Zone Name
super_lead.zone.create.invalid_name: §cInvalid zone name. Use letters, digits, _ or - (1-32 chars).
super_lead.zone.create.invalid_preset: §cInvalid preset pack ID, or the preset does not exist on the server.
super_lead.preset.edit.title: Editing preset: %s
super_lead.preset_binder.create.title: Create Player Preset
super_lead.preset_binder.create.hint: Your UUID suffix is appended automatically to avoid name collisions.
super_lead.preset_binder.create.name: Preset name
super_lead.preset_binder.create.invalid_: §cInvalid name. Use letters, digits, _ or -, up to 23 chars.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.disable: Super Lead: preset packs are disabled by server config.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.already: Super Lead: this preset binder is already bound.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.invalid: Super Lead: invalid name. Use letters, digits, _ or -, up to 23 chars.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.name_ex: Super Lead: preset '%s' already exists. Pick another name.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.create_: Super Lead: could not create preset. Check the server log.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.created: Super Lead: created and bound preset '%s'.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.not_bou: Super Lead: right-click first to create and bind a preset.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.no_perm: Super Lead: you cannot edit this preset.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.no_rope: Super Lead: no bindable rope in view.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.bound_r: Super Lead: added this rope to preset '%s'.
message.super_lead.preset_binder.unbound: Super Lead: removed this rope from preset '%s'.
message.super_lead.preset.import_none: Super Lead: no preset JSON files found in %s.
message.super_lead.preset.export_failed: Super Lead: could not export presets to %s.
message.super_lead.preset.import_failed: Super Lead: could not import presets from %s.
message.super_lead.server_config.op4_req: Super Lead: changing %s requires OP permission level 4.
super_lead.tuning.slack.label: Slack
super_lead.tuning.slack.desc: Slack dial for ropes. 0.0 is taut, 0.1 is very tight, 0.3 is normal, and higher values sag more.
super_lead.tuning.segment.length.label: Segment length
super_lead.tuning.segment.length.desc: Target segment length for newly created rope simulations.
super_lead.tuning.segment.max.label: Max segments
super_lead.tuning.segment.max.desc: Maximum segment count for one rope.
super_lead.tuning.gravity.label: Gravity
super_lead.tuning.gravity.desc: Per-tick gravity acceleration in blocks per tick squared.
super_lead.tuning.damping.label: Damping
super_lead.tuning.iterations.air.label: Air iterations
super_lead.tuning.iterations.air.desc: Constraint iterations for rope segments in open air.
super_lead.tuning.iterations.contact.des: Constraint iterations when terrain, entities, or fields are nearby.
super_lead.tuning.iterations.rope.label: Rope iterations
super_lead.tuning.compliance.label: Compliance
super_lead.tuning.compliance.desc: XPBD distance-constraint compliance. Lower values are stiffer.
super_lead.tuning.contact.pushback.label: Player push-back
super_lead.tuning.contact.pushback.desc: Whether synced physics-zone ropes apply server-side push-back to players touching them.
super_lead.tuning.contact.radius.label: Push-back radius
super_lead.tuning.contact.radius.desc: Soft radius around the rope used for player push-back contacts. Higher values trigger more easily.
super_lead.tuning.contact.spring.label: Push-back strength
super_lead.tuning.contact.spring.desc: Depth-based recoil strength. Higher values feel more like a soft wall.
super_lead.tuning.contact.velocityDampin: Extra resistance based on the player's speed into the rope. Higher values make it harder to force through.
super_lead.tuning.contact.maxRecoilPerTi: Maximum horizontal push-back velocity added to the player each server tick; caps launchiness.
super_lead.tuning.contact.parrotPathfind: Whether parrots can pathfind to ropes in this zone.
Whether players can use ropes in this zone as ziplines.
super_lead.tuning.mode.physics.label: Enable physics
super_lead.tuning.mode.physics.desc: Enable rope physics. Disable to keep ropes in static sag curves.
super_lead.tuning.mode.render3d.label: 3D rope render
super_lead.tuning.mode.render3d.desc: Render ropes as 3D prisms. Disable for camera-facing ribbons.
super_lead.tuning.mode.chunkMeshStaticRo: Bake static ropes into chunk meshes when physics is disabled.
super_lead.tuning.thickness.half.label: Half thickness
super_lead.tuning.thickness.half.desc: Half thickness of the rendered rope in blocks.
super_lead.tuning.ribbon.widthFactor.des: Ribbon width multiplier relative to rope half thickness.
super_lead.tuning.color.normal.base.desc: Base stripe color for normal ropes. Accepts #RRGGBB, 0xRRGGBB, or decimal RGB.
super_lead.tuning.color.normal.accent.de: Accent/bright stripe color for normal ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.redstone.base.de: Base stripe color for redstone ropes; powered ropes brighten this palette.
Accent/bright stripe color for redstone ropes; powered ropes brighten this palette.
super_lead.tuning.color.energy.base.desc: Base stripe color for energy ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.energy.accent.de: Accent and tier-band color for energy ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.item.base.label: Item base
super_lead.tuning.color.item.base.desc: Base stripe color for item ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.item.accent.desc: Accent/bright stripe color for item ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.fluid.base.label: Fluid base
super_lead.tuning.color.fluid.base.desc: Base stripe color for fluid ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.fluid.accent.des: Accent/bright stripe color for fluid ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.pressurized.base: Base stripe color for Mekanism pressurized ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.pressurized.acce: Accent/bright stripe color for Mekanism pressurized ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.thermal.base.des: Base stripe color for Mekanism thermal ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.thermal.accent.d: Accent/bright stripe color for Mekanism thermal ropes.
Base stripe color for AE2 ME cable ropes.
super_lead.tuning.color.ae_network.accen: Accent/channel-band color for AE2 ME cable ropes.
super_lead.tuning.lod.ribbonDistance.des: Distance where ropes switch from prism geometry to ribbons.
super_lead.tuning.lod.stride2Distance.de: Distance where every two physics segments merge for rendering.
super_lead.tuning.lod.stride4Distance.de: Distance where every four physics segments merge for rendering.
super_lead.tuning.attach.itemScale.label: Item scale
super_lead.tuning.attach.itemScale.desc: Render scale for item-style rope attachments.
super_lead.tuning.attach.blockScale.desc: Render scale for block-style rope attachments.
super_lead.tuning.attach.itemDrop.label: Item drop
super_lead.tuning.attach.itemDrop.desc: Vertical drop from the rope for item-style attachments.
super_lead.tuning.attach.blockDrop.label: Block drop
super_lead.tuning.attach.blockDrop.desc: Vertical drop from the rope for block-style attachments.
super_lead.tuning.pick.attachRadius.desc: Client pick radius for placing attachments on a rope.
super_lead.tuning.render.maxDistance.des: Distance beyond which ropes do not render or simulate.
super_lead.tuning.ropeRadius.label: Rope Radius
super_lead.tuning.terrainRadius.label: Terrain Radius
super_lead.tuning.terrainRadius.desc: Rope-vs-terrain collision radius. Larger than ropeRadius so highlights don't clip.
super_lead.tuning.collisionEps.label: Collision Epsilon
super_lead.tuning.terrainProximityMargin: Extra margin when checking for nearby terrain.
super_lead.tuning.segmentCornerPushFacto: Multiplier on ropeRadius for segment-corner push eps.
super_lead.tuning.segmentTopSupportFacto: Multiplier on ropeRadius for segment top-support eps.
super_lead.tuning.minSegments.label: Min Segments
super_lead.tuning.minSegments.desc: Minimum segment count for one rope.
super_lead.tuning.maxSubsteps.label: Max Substeps
super_lead.tuning.substepSpeedTier3.desc: Speed threshold (blocks/tick) for 3 to max substeps.
super_lead.tuning.supportDownInvMass.des: Inverse-mass multiplier for downward push on terrain-supported nodes. <1 = harder to push down.
super_lead.tuning.contactPushGain.label: Contact Push Gain
super_lead.tuning.contactPushGain.desc: Gain applied to external (server-broadcast) contact pushes.
Under-relaxation for rope-rope corrections in parallel solve.
super_lead.tuning.contactNodeDamping.des: Velocity damping applied to nodes that had terrain/rope contact in the current substep.
super_lead.tuning.initialVelocityKick.de: Initial lateral velocity kick to avoid perfectly straight ropes.
super_lead.tuning.settleThresholdTicks.d: Number of consecutive low-motion ticks before a rope is considered settled.
super_lead.tuning.settleMotionSqr.label: Settle Motion Sqr
super_lead.tuning.settleMotionSqr.desc: Squared motion threshold for settle detection.
super_lead.tuning.endpointWakeDistanceSq: Squared endpoint movement threshold for wake-up.
super_lead.tuning.sagArcApproxFactor.des: Arc-length approximation factor for the parabolic sag model.
super_lead.tuning.fullSlackHorizontalRat: Horizontal ratio used in effective-slack calculation.
super_lead.tuning.steepAngleDeg.label: Steep Angle (deg)
super_lead.tuning.steepAngleDeg.desc: Angle threshold (degrees from horizontal) above which a rope is considered steep.
super_lead.tuning.maxTickDelta.label: Max Tick Delta
super_lead.tuning.maxTickDelta.desc: Maximum tick delta to catch up in one step.
super_lead.tuning.tunnelThresholdSqr.des: Squared movement threshold for sweep-and-prune tunnel detection.
super_lead.tuning.zipline.speedLimit.des: Maximum zipline speed in blocks per tick. Use -1 to disable the speed cap.
super_lead.tuning.zipline.redstoneAccele: Multiplier applied to powered redstone zipline acceleration.
super_lead.tuning.contact.topPadding.des: Extra top-surface reach for player-vs-rope contact sampling, making the thin rope easier to stand on.
super_lead.tuning.contact.topNormalThres: Normal-Y threshold used to treat a rope contact as a top/support contact.
super_lead.tuning.contact.sideAbsorb.des: Fraction of inward horizontal normal speed cancelled by side rope contacts; 1.0 fully cancels each tick so the player cannot creep through.
super_lead.tuning.contact.sideIntentRele: How strongly outward movement input disables side absorption so players can leave the rope volume.
super_lead.tuning.contact.sideDeadbandRa: Fraction of contact radius ignored for side absorption to prevent edge-contact mud-trap damping.
super_lead.tuning.contact.entityPushGain: Extra horizontal rope displacement gained from entity approach speed, making high-impulse impacts bend the rope.
super_lead.tuning.contact.pushbackEnable: Minimum penetration depth in blocks before rope push-back activates. Set to 0 to always push back.
